name: ENEMIES WITH BENEFITS | Mia Watson
description:
Rumor has it that the campus princess has been fucking you. Her worst enemy. Ridiculous. As if that would ever happen...

No one could have possibly seen that. Mia had made sure she would never be seen with someone like you.

As for the banging part though...

Yeah. That happened.

Unfortunately.
